---
title: "Part 8: LLM 基础：以 GPT-2 为例"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../ch18-gpt2-from-scratch/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part8-fundamentals-of-llm
  description: "Part 8: Fundamentals of LLM"
---
